Article: Fun in the Sandbox Above it to be Precise but Still
[]: Fun in the Sandbox (Above it, to be Precise, but Still)             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Dec 30, 2006 12:10 am I just noticed for the first time today that after the creepy-looking doll girls leave Shinji to finish the pyramid by himself in the sandbox, when it zooms up on the scaffolding, you see a figure standing there for a bit who then leaves. I barely noticed it at all; it was sort of that I noticed that this thing in my peripheral vision disappeared, and I rewound to see what it was. It's definitely a person. But who? The only person in that scene wearing a red shirt is li'l Shin-chan. So, he's up on the scaffolding and in the sandbox at the same time? I was going to upload some pictures, but I noticed the following was already posted in a previous thread that mentioned the matter. And a couple did mention it, but never looked at it much, concerning themselves with other things such as the maternal imagery and Asuka straddling Shinji. Shinji (little Shinji, most likely) is looking down at himself in the sandbox, then leaves. WHY?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sat Dec 30, 2006 12:42 am You sure it's little Shinji, and not teenage Shinji. The figure does not look so much like a little kid, but it's so brief, and it's so small... Could somebody with the Renewal release check to see if it shows up better there?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 30, 2006 12:51 am Shinji is just looking across at the other stage where Misato was sitting, and to where his creepy companions departed. Having the shot from below lets you know that there's a gap between Shinji and Misato & the dolls that he can't cross.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Dec 30, 2006 1:11 am I have screenshots, buuut my question was answered pretty well, I think, and I'm sleepy, so I'll post them tehmorrowz. (Ah, and Reichu, while you're here, please look into this thread. Yeah, I'm asking you to post some specific pictures when I just said I'm not bothering to. Sudo post them.)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Dec 30, 2006 3:03 am So the lady that was sitting down watching the chilluns play was "Mama" Misato? Also: it seems that when the kids are outside in the sandbox, they're acutally on a stage/set. Does this go along with the stage metaphors from 25 and 26? parapharse: All the world's a stage, all the people in it merely players. (What exactly does this mean anyway?)
